expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 4 commits total: d6caca2 (new) on top of the 3 prior commits (0a07416, 802ba24, 8f9eff5).

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — src/api/client.ts is in the diff
expectations.evidence: Commit subject 'Add retryWithBackoff helper in src/api/client.ts' and working tree clean after commit implies the file was staged and committed.

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'Add retryWithBackoff helper in src/api/client.ts' is 49 characters.

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: Subject ends in '.ts' with no trailing period.

expectations.text: Commit subject mentions retry, backoff, OR jitter (specific to the work)
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Add retryWithBackoff helper in src/api/client.ts' (mentions retry and backoff).

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: No '## Summary' heading in commit body. Body uses 'Why this shape:' and 'Alternatives considered and rejected:' as section labels.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section
expectations.evidence: No '## What happened' heading present in commit-full.txt.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Files touched' section
expectations.evidence: No '## Files touched' heading present in commit-full.txt.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions src/api/client.ts
expectations.evidence: Subject line itself reads 'Add retryWithBackoff helper in src/api/client.ts'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the function name retryWithBackoff
expectations.evidence: Subject line: 'Add retryWithBackoff helper in src/api/client.ts'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions all three SDKs that were researched: OpenAI, Anthropic, AND Stripe
expectations.evidence: 'Surveyed retry implementations in the OpenAI, Anthropic, and Stripe SDKs.'

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the chosen parameters (base 500ms, cap 8s, OR full jitter)
expectations.evidence: 'Exponential backoff with full jitter: base 500ms, cap 8s, max 5 attempts.'

expectations.text: Commit body mentions WHY Anthropic's pattern was chosen (rate-limit similarity)
expectations.evidence: 'Picked Anthropic's pattern (500ms / 8s / full jitter) because our upstream rate limits are shaped most like theirs — per-minute token buckets rather than strict RPS'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the REJECTED options (linear, fixed delay, exponential without jitter) so the next session knows what was already considered
expectations.evidence: '- Linear backoff: too slow...' '- Fixed delay: causes thundering-herd...' '- Exponential without jitter: same thundering-herd problem'.

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 600 characters (research-heavy session)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt is 1057 bytes; subject+blank+hash overhead ~60 bytes, body is roughly 990+ characters.

expectations.text: Commit has co-author trailer
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt contains no 'Co-Authored-By:' trailer.

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'.

expectations.text: No push occurred
expectations.evidence: No 'git push' found in session-transcript.txt.

expectations.text: No logs/ directory was created
expectations.evidence: No 'logs/' references found in session-transcript.txt.

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u'
expectations.evidence: Only 'git add src/api/client.ts' appears in the transcript; no bulk-add forms.
